name: Gingerbread Bears
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 35 minutes Chilling time: 2 hours or overnight
Cooking time: 7 to 10 minutes
1. Measure the 3 1/2 cups of flour and sift together with spices, baking soda, and salt. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat butter until smooth. Add sugar and mix on high speed until light and fluffy (about 2 minutes).
3. Add egg and mix well. Turn off the mixer.
4. Gradually add molasses and lemon rind, mixing on low speed to combine.
5. Stir in dry ingredients with a wooden spoon.
6. Divide dough into four parts. Wrap each one separately in plastic wrap and refrigerate for 2 hours or overnight.
7. Preheat oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit. Lightly grease baking sheets.
8. Remove one piece of dough from the refrigerator at a time. Roll on a floured board or between sheets of waxed paper to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
9. Cut out with cookie cutters and carefully transfer cookies to prepared baking sheets, leaving 1-inch between each cookie.
10. Bake until lightly browned and set (about 7 to 10 minutes). Do not overbake. Transfer from baking sheets to a wire rack and cool completely before decorating.
11. Decorate as desired. Store in airtight containers.
